series_metadata.series_title: Home Medical Equipment Facility Position Descriptions or Proof of Employee Training
series_metadata.series_description: Record series contain Postion Descriptions and proof of employee training for intial home medical equipment license or certificate of registration applications filed between 07/01/2005 and 03/31/2008. Requirement to file Postion Descriptions and proof of employee training was rescinded from OAC 4761:1-5-02 and 4761:1-6-02.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Dispose of following approval date of recrods retention schedule
